allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; logs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(l['log_time'], l['message']\) for l in logs if l['message'].strip\(\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(l.get\('log_time',''\)[:19], l.get\('message',''\)\) for l in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if l.get\('message',''\).strip\(\)]")
